resume.name: ANGAD KUMAR
resume.summary: AI Engineer with hands-on experience building production-aligned AI and analytics systems. Strong foundation in machine learning, data engineering pipelines, and backend services using Python, Databricks, and Delta Lake, with domain exposure in healthcare and financial analytics.

points: Contributed to AI-driven analytics and machine learning proof-of-concept solutions, including the AIMedicis healthcare intelligence platform.
Developed backend APIs, data engineering pipelines, and analytics workflows using Python, FastAPI, Databricks, Apache Spark, and Delta Lake.
Integrated machine learning models into batch and streaming pipelines following Medallion Architecture (Bronze-Silver-Gold) within Agile teams.

projects.name: AIMedicis - AI-Driven Healthcare Intelligence Platform
points: Developed FastAPI-based backend services to support AI-driven healthcare analytics.
Implemented multi-agent AI workflows for medical data analysis and insight generation.
Built secure medical image and document management services using MongoDB GridFS.

projects.name: NextGen Healthcare Analytics Using Delta Lake
points: Designed a scalable healthcare analytics platform using PySpark, Spark SQL, and Delta Lake with Medallion Architecture.
Built schema-aware ingestion pipelines to process complex semi-structured data while preserving raw data traceability.
Transformed nested JSON into analytics-ready datasets, ensuring referential integrity across core healthcare entities.

projects.name: Real-Time Financial Fraud Detection & Monitoring System
points: Designed a real-time fraud detection system using Databricks Structured Streaming.
Implemented Isolation Forest-based anomaly detection for transaction scoring.
Built Gold-layer datasets and dashboards for real-time fraud monitoring.

education: • KPRIET College - B.E. in CSE | 2021 - 2025 | Coimbatore, India
certifications: • Databricks Certified Data Engineer Associate - December 2025

rawText:
ANGAD KUMAR

Email : Kumarangad91289@gmail.com
Phone : 9128949854

LinkedIn : angadkumar54
GitHub : angadkumar9128
Leet Code : kumar_A_91289

SUMMARY
AI Engineer with hands-on experience building production-aligned AI and analytics systems. Strong foundation in
machine learning, data engineering pipelines, and backend services using Python, Databricks, and Delta Lake, with
domain exposure in healthcare and financial analytics.

CERTIFICATIONS
• Databricks Certified Data Engineer Associate – December 2025
• Oracle Cloud Infrastructure Certified Generative AI Professional – October 2025
• Oracle AI Foundations Associate – August 2025
• AWS Cloud Practitioner Essentials – AWS, November 2024
• The Joy of Computing using Python – NPTEL, June 2024
• Fundamentals of Data Analytics – L&T, August 2023

WORK EXPERIENCE
Associate AI Engineer – SriD Software Solutions | March 2025 – Present
Contributed to AI-driven analytics and machine learning proof-of-concept solutions, including the AIMedicis
healthcare intelligence platform.
Developing backend APIs, data engineering pipelines, and analytics workflows using Python, FastAPI, Databricks,
Apache Spark, and Delta Lake.
Integrating machine learning models into batch and streaming pipelines following Medallion Architecture (Bronze–
Silver–Gold) within Agile teams.

PROJECTS
AIMedicis – AI-Driven Healthcare Intelligence Platform Role : AI Engineer | Duration: Ongoing
Developed FastAPI-based backend services to support AI-driven healthcare analytics.
Implemented multi-agent AI workflows for medical data analysis and insight generation.
Built secure medical image and document management services using MongoDB GridFS.
NextGen Healthcare Analytics Using Delta Lake Role : Transformation Engineer | Duration: 2 month
Designed a scalable healthcare analytics platform using PySpark, Spark SQL, and Delta Lake with Medallion Architecture.
Built schema-aware ingestion pipelines to process complex semi-structured data while preserving raw data traceability.
Transformed nested JSON into analytics-ready datasets, ensuring referential integrity across core healthcare entities.
Real-Time Financial Fraud Detection & Monitoring System Role: ML & Analytics Engineer | Duration : 3 Month
Designed a real-time fraud detection system using Databricks Structured Streaming.
Implemented Isolation Forest–based anomaly detection for transaction scoring.
Built Gold-layer datasets and dashboards for real-time fraud monitoring.

TECHNICAL SKILLS
• Programming Languages: Python, SQL, PySpark, Java
• AI & Machine Learning: Machine Learning, Anomaly Detection, Feature Engineering, Model Integration
• Frameworks & Libraries: TensorFlow, NumPy, Pandas, Matplotlib
• Data Engineering & Analytics: Batch & Streaming Pipelines, Medallion Architecture, Data Analysis
• Big Data & Platforms: Apache Spark, Databricks, Delta Lake
• Databases: MongoDB, PostgreSQL, MySQL
• Cloud & Dev Practices: AWS (Foundational), Git & GitHub, Agile
• Tools & IDEs: Power BI, Excel, Jupyter Notebook, PyCharm, Visual Studio Code

EDUCATION
• KPRIET College – B.E. in CSE | 2021 - 2025 | Coimbatore, India
• D.P.R. College – HSC | 2019 - 2020 | Siwan, Bihar

AREA OF INTEREST
• Data Science • Artificial Intelligence • Machine Learning • Generative AI
